name: Non-resident at median income (MXN 500,000/year)
description: Non-resident employee earning MXN 500,000 annually. First MXN 125,900 exempt, then 15% on remainder. No IMSS, no subsidy.

sources.description: Calculated using 2026 non-resident withholding rates from PwC: exempt up to 125,900, 15% to 1M, 30% above.
